detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description inside
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description outside
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
acl number 3000
 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255

 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 nat outbound 3001
ike proposal 10
 authentication-algorithm sha1
 encryption-algorithm aes-256
 dh group2
 sa duration 86400

ike peer 198.18.254.2
 ike-proposal 10
 remote-address 198.18.254.2
 pre-shared-key __REDACTED__

ipsec proposal AES256
 esp authentication-algorithm sha1
 esp encryption-algorithm aes-256

 tunnel-protocol ipsec

 destination 198.18.254.2

 ike-peer 198.18.254.2
 proposal AES256
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254

detail.translated:
hostname FIREWALL_NAT_SP
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description To-Internal
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 description To-Internet
 nameif outside
 security-level 0
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
object network NET_INSIDE
 subnet 10.0.0.0 255.255.0.0
nat (inside,outside) source static NET_INSIDE NET_INSACE interface ! MANUAL_REVIEW: 华为使用PAT模式地址池，ASA PAT通常使用interface关键字而非静态地址池，此处需要根据实际流量验证
route outside 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254 1

detail.translated:
hostname FIREWALL_OBJ_POLICY
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description To-LAN
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 nameif inside
 security-level 85
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description To-DMZ
 ip address 10.0.1.1 255.255.255.0
 nameif dmz
 security-level 50
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/2
 description To-WAN
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 nameif outside
 security-level 5
 no shutdown
object-group network LAN_SERVERS
 network-object host 10.0.0.10
 network-object host 10.0.0.11
exit
!
object-group network DMZ_SERVERS
 network-object host 10.0.1.10
 network-object host 10.0.1.11
exit
!
object-group service WEB_SERVICES tcp
 port-object eq 80
 port-object eq 443
exit
access-list LAN_TO_DMZ extended permit tcp object LAN_SERVERS object DMZ_SERVERS eq http
access-list LAN_TO_DMZ extended permit tcp object LAN_SERVERS object DMZ_SERVERS eq https
!
access-list DMZ_TO_WAN extended permit ip object-group DMZ_SERVERS any
!
access-list WAN_TO_LAN_DENY extended deny ip any object-group LAN_SERVERS
access-list WAN_TO_LAN_DENY extended permit ip any any
!
access-group LAN_TO_DMZ in interface inside
access-group DMZ_TO_WAN in interface dmz
access-group WAN_TO_LAN_DENY in interface outside
